name: PoTRE: Test-Time Reasoning inspired by Cognitive Heterogeneity

description: arXiv:2607.20268v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at many tasks, they frequently struggle with complex reasoning that requires long-horizon planning and iterative error correction. Furthermore, standard single-stream prompting proves brittle when models encounter novel abstractions or rigorous domain constraints. We introduce PoTRE (Poly-Topological Reason...
